title: Fryzer's Fresh Animation JAVA
description: Fresh animation look-a-like Modpack. Works on server that run customs ressource pack like Complex-Gaming.
body:
Fresh animation look-a-like Modpack. Works on server that run custom ressources pack like Complex-Gaming.

This mod pack add animation to minecraft that are look-a-like with the fresh animation Texture-pack from Bedrock.

-Player animation
-Mob animation
-3D items
-Custom enchantement outline
-Custom Texture with Fractures 3D (Rename item)
-Customazible HUD
-Mini map
-Zoom
-Smooth scrolling/item swapping
-Custom effects
-Custom sounds
-Mob health bar
-MODMENU
-&more

Also has optimization mods to make it run smooth.

Compatible with LiteMatica

For any questions, add me on discord : Freezegames#3636
